mapper.select: SELECT * FROM task_status_requests WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND review_status = 'PENDING' LIMIT 1
SELECT r.* FROM task_status_requests r WHERE r.review_status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_status_requests (task_id, applicant_id, from_status, to_status, apply_reason, review_status) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{applicantId}, #{fromStatus}, #{toStatus}, #{applyReason}, #{reviewStatus})
